docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAN SCANLAN, VP EMERITUS TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2023 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAN SCANLAN, VP EMERITAS TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO JAN-19-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES ARE MADE. CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT DOWD, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $95) SERVED JUL-29-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOWD, JOSEPH

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2022 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER TO NOV-17-2022 AT 3:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP EMERITAS TOWING & QA. DEFENDANT JOSEPH DOWD IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-19-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-19-2023 BY JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP EMERITUS TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. DEFENDANT JOSEPH DOWD IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOWD, JOSEPH $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,695.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
